title: Ex Machinis
description: Automation addon for Ex Nihilo Sequentia
body:
![Ex Machinis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kETAhKGy/images/bb987916f6d1efc0ba9dc8ad9abc6a97c3408045.png "Ex Machinis")

Automation addon for [Ex Nihilo: Sequentia](https://modrinth.com/mod/ex-nihilo-sequentia "Ex Nihilo: Sequentia"). Adds an RF powered Sieve, Hammer, and Compactor.

This mod does not provide power generation - you will need a separate mod for that, like [Thermal Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-expansion "Thermal Expansion") or [Powah! Rearchitected](https://modrinth.com/mod/powah "Powah! Rearchitected").

Mods in photo: [CobbleForDays](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblefordays "CobbleForDays"), [Pipez](https://modrinth.com/mod/pipez "Pipez"), [Thermal Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/thermal-expansion "Thermal Expansion")
